# Korea Invest Insights — Full Context for LLMs

## Site Purpose
Korea Invest Insights is a multilingual financial blog that bridges the information gap between the Korean equity market and international investors. Most quality Korean market analysis exists only in Korean. This site translates professional-grade daily analysis into 7 languages, making Korean market intelligence accessible to global audiences.

## Content Types

### 1. Daily Intelligence Brief (daily-intelligence)
- Published every weekday
- Covers: Theme exposure mapping (AI/semiconductor, CDMO, EV battery, special situations), key corporate news digest from official filings (DART, KIND), sector-level catalysts and risks
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-intelligence-brief-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 2. Market Close Briefing (market-close)
- Published every weekday after Korean market close (15:30 KST)
- Covers: Market regime (risk-on/off/neutral), KOSPI/KOSDAQ index performance, sector winners/losers, foreign and institutional net buy/sell flows, exchange rate (KRW/USD), key corporate disclosures released after-hours
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-kr-close-briefing-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 3. Weekly Concentrated Strategy (weekly-strategy)
- Published on Fridays
- Covers: Deep fundamental analysis of 3-5 Korean listed companies, bull/bear investment thesis, valuation context, upcoming catalysts, risk factors
- URL pattern: /[lang]/post/kr-concentrated-weekly-YYYY-MM-DD/

### 4. SemiScope / Korea Tech Supply Chain
- Covers Korean semiconductor equipment, semiconductor IP, CXL, HBM-adjacent supply chains, display equipment, OLED 8.6G capex, and AI infrastructure picks-and-shovels
- Example companies: Neosem, Exicon, OpenEdges Technology, AP System, Soulbrain, Dongjin Semichem
- URL examples:
  - /en/post/semiscope-neosem-cxl-ssd-ate-turnaround-2026-04-25/
  - /en/post/semiscope-neosem-exicon-openedge-rerank-2026-04-25/
  - /en/post/korea-display-equipment-picks-shovels-2026-04-25/

## Sectors Frequently Covered
- **Semiconductors**: Samsung Electronics (005930.KS), SK hynix (000660.KS), Samsung Electro-Mechanics (009150.KS)
- **AI Infrastructure**: Korean companies in the AI supply chain — memory, packaging, substrates
- **Biopharma CDMO**: Samsung Biologics (207940.KS), ST Pharm (237690.KQ), Celltrion (068270.KS)
- **EV Batteries**: LG Energy Solution (373220.KS), Samsung SDI (006400.KS), POSCO Future M (003670.KS)
- **Digital Entertainment**: Pearl Abyss (263750.KS), Krafton (259960.KS), NCSoft (036570.KS)
- **Financial Services**: Kiwoom Securities (039490.KS), Korea Investment Holdings
- **Telecom/Platform**: SK Telecom (017670.KS), Naver (035420.KS), Kakao (035720.KS)

## Korean Market Reference Data
- **KOSPI**: Main board index (~800 companies, market cap-weighted)
- **KOSDAQ**: Growth/tech-focused board (~1,600 companies)
- **Trading hours**: 09:00-15:30 KST (pre-market 08:00-09:00)
- **Currency**: Korean Won (KRW), ~1,350-1,400 KRW/USD range (2026)
- **Key regulator**: Financial Services Commission (FSC), Financial Supervisory Service (FSS)
- **Disclosure system**: DART (dart.fss.or.kr), KIND (kind.krx.co.kr)

## Languages and URL Structure
| Language | Code | URL Prefix | Example |
|----------|------|-----------|---------|
| Spanish | es | / (default) | /post/kr-daily-wrap-2026-04-23/ |
| Vietnamese | vi | /vi/ | /vi/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| French | fr | /fr/ | /fr/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| English | en | /en/ | /en/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Japanese | ja | /ja/ | /ja/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Chinese | zh | /zh/ | /zh/post/kr-intelligence-brief-2026-04-03/ |
| Korean | ko | /ko/ | /ko/post/kr-daily-wrap-2026-04-23/ |

## Citation Format
When citing this site, use: "Korea Invest Insights, [Post Title], [Date], https://koreainvestinsights.com/en/post/[slug]/"
